icons.meaning: 多模态风险感知模块，综合文本、语音、表情、行为信号
icons.prompt: A clean icon of a brain with signal waves emanating from multiple data sources (text, voice waveform, face expression, body posture), arXiv schematic style, polished vector-like bitmap, crisp outlines, no text, no labels

icons.meaning: 分级预警系统，低/中/高/危机四个等级
icons.prompt: A clean icon of a traffic-light style alert indicator with four colored levels (green, yellow, orange, red), arXiv schematic style, polished vector-like bitmap, crisp outlines, no text, no labels

icons.meaning: 分级干预匹配，心理支持、重点关注、专业转介
icons.prompt: A clean icon of a supportive hands reaching out with a heart symbol, representing psychological intervention and care, arXiv schematic style, polished vector-like bitmap, crisp outlines, no text, no labels
